should_trigger.prompt: Use Period Comparison on this sales Excel file and show year-over-year charts.
Compare current sales to previous year and generate the column, line and waterfall charts.
Build period comparison small multiples by product line for this CSV.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Run price volume mix variance and root-cause decomposition.
Reconcile this journal against the bank statement.
Validate this Deep Research report against cited sources.
